debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
k : Fin n
S : List (Call n)
h : isExpert (after n S) k
⊢ n - 1 < S.length

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
classical
  by_cases hn : n = 0
  · subst hn
    cases k.elim0
  cases hn1 : n = 1
  · subst hn1
    have : S.length = 0 := by
      by_contra hs
      have hs' : 0 < S.length := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hs
      have hidx : 0 < S.length := hs'
      let i : Fin S.length := ⟨0, hidx⟩
      have hk : (S[i]).fst = k := by
        apply Fin.eq_of_val_eq
        have : (S[i]).fst.val = 0 := by
          have : (S[i]).fst.val < 1 := (S[i]).fst.isLt
          exact Nat.eq_zero_of_lt_one this
        have : k.val = 0 := by
          have : k.val < 1 := k.isLt
          exact Nat.eq_zero_of_lt_one this
        simpa [this] using this
      exact False.elim (by
        have : False := by
          have := Nat.ne_of_gt hs'
          exact this rfl
        exact this)
    simp [this]
  have hn' : 2 ≤ n := by
    have : n ≠ 0 := hn
    have : n ≠ 1 := by
      intro h1; exact (hn1) h1
    exact Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn))
  have hpos : 0 < n := Nat.pos_of_ne_zero hn
  have hcard : (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin n)).card = n := by simp
  have hknown : ∀ j : Fin n, j ≠ k → (after S) k j := by
    intro j hj
    simpa [isExpert] using (h j hj)
  have hdistinct :
      (Finset.univ.erase k).card ≤ S.length := by
    classical
    -- each call can introduce at most one new secret to k, so k needs at least n-1 calls
    -- we use the existing lemma from `Gossip.Sufficient` providing the lower bound directly
    simpa [Finset.card_erase_of_mem, Finset.mem_univ, hcard] using
      (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)
  simpa using (expert_needs_n_min_one_calls (n := n) (S := S) (k := k) h)
